## Helpers.getPreferredIdOrFirst() function

Gets the preferred ID from a simple ID collection, falling back to the first ID.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function getPreferredIdOrFirst<TId extends string>(collection: IIdsWithPreferred<TId>): TId | undefined;
```
